title: Just Some Mods
description: "Just Some Mods" is a hardcore survival experience based on the "Better Than Wolves" mod.
body:
## Announcement
- The modpack is going to be updated less frequently since I can't find any more mods/resource packs that I can add, if you want to help you can join the discord server and give some recommendations

- I recommend that if you have a world in an old version and want to move it to a new version, make a world backup

- Version 2.0 and below of the modpack is more inspired by the RLCraft modpack

- Oh and also thx for the 1,700 downloads!!

# **JSM**
Hey everyone! Today, I’m excited to introduce 'Just Some Mods', a modpack designed for those who are looking for a real challenge. If you think Minecraft has gotten too easy, this modpack is made for you. The difficulty has been cranked up, with stronger enemies and an environment that forces you to think strategically to survive.

But it’s not just harder, it’s also more beautiful! 'Just Some Mods' brings stunning visual improvements that make the world of Minecraft feel more immersive and detailed. From dynamic lighting to subtle graphical tweaks, the game looks better than ever, all without compromising performance.

Additionally, this modpack introduces new structures, including exciting dungeons filled with treasures and challenges. Every corner of the world hides something new, and the brave adventurers who explore these dungeons will face unique obstacles.

And best of all, it’s focused on realism. From survival mechanics to environmental interactions, everything feels more authentic, adding an extra layer of depth to your Minecraft experience.

If you’re looking for a modpack that tests your skills, enhances the visuals, and offers a more realistic, immersive world, 'Just Some Mods' is exactly what you need. Don’t miss out!

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b41e7bf29428a51823462256fca97f3dfc25c59_0.webp)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ba72ed62993b543d3a5aaf69321a7b17afaf92_0.webp)
